properties.body:
NAVAREA XIX 87/23
  
 M/V RAMFORM HYPERION IS CONDUCTING SEISMIC SURVEY OPERATIONS FROM 02 JULY 2023 IN NORWEGIAN SEA, VORINGPLATAAET IN AREA BOUNDED BY: 

 A. 67-19.5N 003-56.5E.
 B. 67-48.7N 006-16.1E.
 C. 67-13.9N 007-24.3E.
 D. 67-04.6N 006-25.8E.
 C. 66-39.1N 007-19.5E.
 D. 66-32.6N 006-36.3E.
 E. 66-25.6N 005-45.9E.
 F. 65-59.7N 003-42.8E.
 G. 66-41.4N 002-06.3E.
 H. 67-01.8N 003-45.0E.
 I. 67-07.3N 003-48.5E.
 J. 67-07.3N 003-48.6E.
 K. 67-07.4N 003-48.6E.
 L. 67-19.5N 003-56.5E.

 TOWING 14 SEISMIC CABLES WITH A MAXIMUM LENGHT OF 6NM, TOTAL WIDHT 1NM. 
 WIDE BERTH REQUESTED, MINIMUM 3 NM AHEAD, 7 NM ASTERN AND 3 NM ABEAM.
 VESSELS STANDING BY ON VHF CH 72 AND 16.
 SUPPORT VESSEL MV THOR OMEGA AND MV AAS PROVIDER IN ATTENDANCE.

 2.CANCEL NAVARE XIX 83/23.
